title: Spicy Crispy Corn Stir-fry
description: A delightful and nostalgic twist on a traditional Portuguese dish featuring sweetcorn in a spicy and crispy sauce.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix corn kernels with red bell pepper and garlic. Season lightly with salt.
Spread the mixture evenly on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15 minutes or until edges are golden brown and crispy.
While sweetcorn is baking, heat olive oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add chorizo to the hot pan and stir-fry for about 2-3 minutes until fragrant and slightly crispy. Remove from heat.
In the same wok, add paprika powder and sauté briefly, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Return chorizo and corn mixture to the wok. Drizzle lime juice over everything and toss gently to combine.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course with crusty bread.
